sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Character-Specific Weapons
special_mechanics.description: Each character can obtain character-dependent weapons: Cody gets a knife, Guy uses shurikens, Haggar obtains an oversized mallet

special_mechanics.name: Level-Based Attack Progression
special_mechanics.description: At Level 4, characters gain special attacks performed by rapidly pressing directional pad and attack button: Cody gains Tornado Sweep (energy projectile), Guy gains Tornado Kick, Haggar gains Running Clothesline

special_mechanics.name: Experience Points System
special_mechanics.description: Players gain EXP by defeating enemies; stronger finishing moves award more points. After accumulating EXP, player levels up increasing attack power and maximum vitality. Six skill levels total. Cody and Guy start at Level 1, Haggar starts at Level 3

tier_notes: Tier 2: Game is a beat-em-up/platformer hybrid with documented gameplay mechanics but no precise physics parameters available in public sources. Character movement parameters not documented. Available sources focus on game structure, mechanics, and regional differences rather than technical physics data.
sources_used: data_crystal - Mighty Final Fight (technical ROM data, mapper info)
tcrf - Mighty Final Fight (regional differences, game structure)
wikipedia - Mighty Final Fight (gameplay mechanics, character abilities, leveling system)
